steps.t: Traps can be found on the north-western edge of Thinglad's trees, set by the huntsmen of Stangard. You should destroy the traps, for they are not perm…
Noriel is awaiting you in Thinglad's Elf-keep of Haldirith. You should return to Noriel, now that you have destroyed the unlawfully-placed traps.
